title: Advanced Bobbing Camera And Item
body: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/r9xG4rj7dJA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>**A client-side mod that completely overhauls the first-person camera and item animations, adding incredibly smooth, realistic head-bobbing and weapon sway with inertia physics. Fully customizable via sliders in the vanilla Options menu.**
